privacy.subtitle: What you can and cannot submit to Company Brain
privacy.intro: Company Brain routes your queries through our internal API to Claude (Anthropic). Anthropic's API terms confirm that <bold>API data is not used to train their models</bold>. Your data is still subject to our internal data handling policies and Philippines <law>Data Privacy Act 2012 (Republic Act 10173)</law>. Follow the guidelines below at all times.
privacy.trafficSub: A quick reference for deciding what is safe to input.
privacy.redTagline: Strictly prohibited. Report accidental submission immediately.
privacy.bestPracticesSub: Follow these habits to protect the company and your colleagues.
privacy.legalSub: How your data travels and the laws that govern it.
privacy.printFooter: Company Brain — Data Privacy Guidelines — Last updated March 2026
